basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM Bangalore) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Library Trainee. Candidates with MLISc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIM Bangalore official website iimb.ac.in.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 25 years as on closing date of application.

qualification.education_qualification: MLISc passed out after 2024, 2025 with first class.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Bangalore Library Trainee Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: IIM Bangalore Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
